waiver.reason_summary: The controller environment was temporarily missing a documented dependency or bootstrap artifact needed to execute the full gate.
waiver.detail: schema-validation (gate-bypasses waiver format) and service-completeness (dozzle health gate) are pre-existing failures in origin/main; unrelated to ADR-0360 OpenBao cert hardening. All checks for changed files pass.
waiver.remediation_ref: pre-existing: dozzle health gate and gate-bypasses schema exist in origin/main prior to this change
